preamble: The nasalized vowel [õ] reduces to schwa [ə] in unstressed syllables through stress-conditioned vowel reduction. This process is well-documented in Romance languages, where nasalization is lost as the vowel centralizes in weak positions.

examples.note: Nasalized [õ] reduces to schwa in unstressed contexts in rapid or casual French speech.
Reduction of nasalized [õ] in unstressed syllables with denasalization.
